title: Protect identity and access in Azure
summary: Protect identity and access in Azure

sections.title: Protect identity and access in Azure
sections.summary: Protect identity and access in Azure

lessons.title: Manage security controls for identity and access
lessons.content_md:
This module focuses on effectively managing security controls in Microsoft Entra ID by securing identities, authentication, and authorization to protect users, groups, and external identities against threats while ensuring secure and seamless access to resources.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-security-controls-identity-access/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Manage security controls for identity and access

lessons.title: Manage Microsoft Entra application access
lessons.content_md:
This module focuses on effectively managing identities and enhancing security in Microsoft Enterprise Identity, ensuring that users, groups, and external identities are protected against security threats and unauthorized access.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-application-access-microsoft-entra-id/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Protect identity and access in Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Protect identity and access in Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
